NAI Hiffman is proud to announce space availability in the Sungate Industrial Park located at 5410-5480 W Roosevelt Road, Chicago Illinois. IDI Sungate Industrial Park is a 1,364,700 SF complex on 47.5 acres and is approximately 7 miles west of Downtown Chicago and 1,000 feet from a full, 4-way interchange at Central Avenue and I-290. The site is serviced by both the CTA bus and train. Sungate Industrial Park sits in a historic manufacturing district that is rapidly becoming a key infill logistics location due to its proximity to the expressway and access to a strong labor force. The property offers a mix of warehouse/flex/office spaces and has the flexibility to accommodate car and trailer parking requirements. 1,364,700 SF total building size 47.5 acres, 13' clear height, 15 drive-in bays, 30 interior dock doors, 30 exterior dock doors, 60 levelers, 30' x 30' column spacing, 1,700 car spaces

Brush Hill Office Courte is a four (4) building single-story office park located in Westmont, IL. Due to its single-story design, the park is perfect for companies which require 24/7 access and control of their utilities and HVAC. Brush Hill Office Courte ownership believes in quick and quality service which is why they have a full-time asset manager, who is located on-site. Each building has operable perimeter windows, in-suite washrooms and many suites have 2 access points in order to accommodate an employee and guest entrance. There are ready-made suites available for immediate occupancy and/or the ability to explore build-to-suit opportunities. Brush Hill Office Courte is located in Westmont, IL, just south of Oak Brook, IL home to companies such as Manroland, SIRVA, AutoNation, Manor Care and many more. Companies are attracted to Westmont and Brush Hill Office Courte for its building efficiencies, access to public transportation and close proximity to the interstate system, hotels, restaurants and multiple other amenities located just minutes from Brush Hill Office Courte
